news.headline: Blackstone's AI plan exceeding $100 billion sparks criticism.
Kennametal Inc. (NYSE: KMT) named among America's Most Responsible Companies 2025 by Newsweek for the fourth consecutive year.
news.summary: For the fourth year in a row, Kennametal Inc. (NYSE: KMT) has been recognized on the list of America's Most Responsible Companies 2025 by Newsweek. This achievement marks a significant milestone for Kennametal, reflecting their commitment to corporate responsibility and sustainability. The company's inclusion on this esteemed list for the fourth consecutive year highlights their dedication to ethical business practices and environmental stewardship. This recognition underscores Kennametal's ongoing efforts to make a positive impact on society, with a focus on social responsibility and accountability.

news.headline: Inventor from Atlanta develops HANGERZ ON mask accessory for enhanced comfort, eliminates bothersome ear loops.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Atlanta, Georgia, shared his motivation behind creating a new protective face mask accessory. Named the HANGERZ ON, the invention aims to offer users improved comfort. The designer eliminated the inconvenience of dealing with uncomfortable ear loops. This innovative solution could potentially revolutionize the way people use face masks.

news.headline: Corey Horowitz joins Mohr Partners as Managing Partner in NYC, a top-three global real estate firm.
news.summary: In Dallas on December 9, 2024, Mohr Partners, Inc., a leading global corporate real estate advisory firm, welcomed Corey Horowitz as the new Managing Partner at its New York office. Horowitz, an industry veteran, will be a key member of the firm's market team.

news.headline: Global ovo-sexing technology market worth $105.848 Mn by 2031, with 8.8% CAGR growth - The Insight Partners.
news.summary: In New York on December 9, 2024, a recent in-depth study by The Insight Partners revealed a substantial increase in the global ovo-sexing technology market. This growth is primarily attributed to the growing attention to ethical standards for animal welfare and a heightened focus on commercialization. The report highlights key statistics and trends in the market, showing a promising outlook for the industry.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk started share repurchase programme up to DKK 20 billion on 11 Nov 2024, to be completed by 6 Feb 2025.
news.summary: In Bagsværd, Denmark, on 9 December 2024, Novo Nordisk launched a share repurchase initiative on 11 November 2024, following guidelines set out in Regulation No 596/2014 of the European Parliament and Council dated 16 April 2014 (MAR) and the Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052 of 8 March 2016 (the "Safe Harbour Rules"). The program is part of an overall share buyback plan totaling up to DKK 20 billion to be completed within a 12-month period starting on 6 February 2024.

news.headline: 20 Teamsters at i-Health in Enfield, Conn., forced to strike due to company's unfair practices.
news.summary: i-Health workers in Enfield, Connecticut, including 20 Teamsters, have initiated a strike due to the company's unfair labor practices. The employees were compelled to take action against i-Health's violations of their rights. The workers decided to picket after i-Health demonstrated a lack of willingness to negotiate fairly.

news.headline: 18,000 Costco Teamsters set to rally for fair contract amid contract negotiations, protesting unfair labor practices.
news.summary: In Long Beach, California on December 9, 2024, about 18,000 Costco Teamsters, including Teamsters General President Sean M. O'Brien and Teamsters General Secretary-Treasurer Fred Zuckerman, are gearing up to demand a fair contract and protest against unfair labor practices. The workers are preparing to take a stand against these issues, signaling a significant movement in the fight for better working conditions. It is anticipated that this action will attract considerable attention as hundreds of rank-and-file Costco Teamsters are expected to participate in this cause.

news.headline: Wilson Elser relocates 81 staff in Dallas to Santander Tower, a 50-story building, for long-term planning.
news.summary: In a recent press release on December 9, 2024, Wilson Elser, a prominent national law firm, revealed that 81 of its attorneys and staff members from the Dallas office have successfully relocated to a new address situated in the 50-story Santander Tower as of today. This strategic move to the new location aims to provide better prospects for planning the future growth and operations of the Dallas office.

news.headline: Lariat in Liberty Hill, Texas, is expanding with 579 homes in its second phase on a 706-acre plot.
news.summary: In Liberty Hill, Texas, a new development called Lariat is transforming the living experience in the heart of the Texas Hill Country. The second phase of this master-planned community includes the construction of 579 homes on a sprawling 706-acre property. The project aims to create a vibrant hub where residents can live, play, and connect in the picturesque landscape of Liberty Hill.

news.headline: SKYX will present at Benchmark Conference on 12/11/24 at 3:30pm.
news.summary: In response to the recent surge in COVID-19 cases, the government announced new restrictions to curb the spread of the virus. The restrictions include a ban on gatherings of more than 50 people, mandatory mask-wearing in all public places, and a 10 p.m. curfew for all non-essential businesses. The decision comes as the country recorded a record high of 5,000 new cases in the past week, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to over 20,000. Health officials stress the importance of following the guidelines to prevent further transmission and protect public health.

news.headline: EU's investigations into Big Tech will coincide with Trump's presidency.
NY court rules SoHo-NoHo rezoning unconstitutional due to unconstitutional fee by de Blasio admin, a victory for residents. Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: A recent ruling declared a fee imposed by the de Blasio Administration as unconstitutional, to the benefit of SoHo and NoHo residents. The New York Supreme Court's Appellate Division unanimously invalidated the fee, voted upon just before the administration's end. This decision is a significant win for the community as it removes an unlawful financial burden.

news.headline: Voyant Beauty appoints Brad Schechtman as CFO, bringing 20 years of manufacturing finance experience to aid growth.
news.summary: In Hodgkins, Illinois, Voyant Beauty has announced the appointment of Brad Schechtman as the Chief Financial Officer. This move signifies a dedication to expansion under CEO Ed Byczynski's leadership. With 20 years of experience in manufacturing finance, Schechtman is set to enhance the company's financial strategies and drive growth.

news.headline: Condor closes $19.4M brokered financing for common shares at $1.90 each, including agents' option of $2.4M.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on December 9, 2024, Condor Energies Inc. (“Condor” or the “Company”) (TSX: CDR) has successfully completed a brokered offering of common shares at $1.90 per share, resulting in total gross proceeds of around $19.4 million. This includes the agents’ option exercise adding approximately $2.4 million to the Offering.

news.headline: Landsbankinn offered bondholders in series LBANK T2I 29 to exchange bonds at a price of 100 with yield of 3.85%.
news.summary: Landsbankinn has provided a tender offer to bondholders holding bonds in the LBANK T2I 29 series with the ISIN number IS0000031649. The offer allows bondholders to exchange their bonds for cash at a fixed clean price of 100, resulting in a yield of 3.85%.

news.headline: Jackie Griffith appointed as Senior Strategic Advisor for Govt & Community Relations by Citizens for Judicial Fairness.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Del., Jackie Griffith has been appointed as the Senior Strategic Advisor for Government and Community Relations by Citizens for Judicial Fairness. With more than 30 years of experience in government relations, public policy, and community outreach, Jackie brings a high level of expertise and demonstrated leadership skills to the organization. In this newly established position, she will be responsible for managing all operations of Citizens for Judicial Fairness.

news.headline: SecureAuth introduces biometric continuous identity assurance to protect data, preventing unauthorized access.
news.summary: SecureAuth has expanded its range of identity and access management solutions by incorporating new technology to enhance security. The technology aims to prevent unauthorized access to sensitive information throughout a user's session. The company, based in Irvine, California, announced the update on December 9, 2024. This development is expected to further strengthen SecureAuth's ability to protect valuable data and maintain secure user sessions.

news.headline: $168M+ value achieved in 99 Cents Only Stores LLC liquidation by Hilco Real Estate.
news.summary: Hilco Real Estate, LLC (HRE) based in Northbrook, Illinois, revealed on December 9, 2024, that they have effectively sold real estate assets connected to the Chapter 11 bankruptcy situation of 99 Cents Only Stores, LLC. 99 Cents Only Stores, a well-known discount retailer established in 1982 in Los Angeles, was the subject of this transaction.

news.headline: EU and Trump clash over tech crackdown, tensions rise.
Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP investigates Citi Trends, Inc. (NASDAQ: CTRN) for shareholder concern on Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP reported an ongoing investigation into Citi Trends, Inc. (NASDAQ: CTRN) to assess potential breaches of fiduciary duties by the company's directors. This investigation is being conducted on behalf of Citi Trends shareholders. Crucial details regarding the inquiry will be scrutinized to ascertain any wrongdoing on the part of the directors.

news.headline: Investigation launched by Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP into BellRing Brands, Inc. (NYSE: BRBR) for fiduciary duty breach.
news.summary: A law firm, Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP, has disclosed that they are conducting an inquiry into BellRing Brands, Inc. (NYSE: BRBR) as of December 9, 2024, on behalf of the shareholders of the company. The investigation aims to establish whether the directors at BellRing Brands may have violated their fiduciary responsibilities.

news.headline: AI in medical diagnostics market to reach USD 4.72B by 2029, growing from USD 1.71B in 2024 at a 22.5% CAGR.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of December 9, 2024, it has been reported that the global market for artificial intelligence (AI) in medical diagnostics is expected to experience significant growth. Starting at USD 1.71 billion in 2024, this market is projected to reach USD 4.72 billion by 2029, showing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 22.5% during this period. The expansion of this market can be attributed to various factors, including the increasing accessibility of big data which fuels the advancement and implementation of AI technologies in the medical field.

news.headline: Global Electrostatic Precipitator System Market to hit USD 17.1 billion by 2031 due to rising demand for air pollution control solutions.
news.summary: Stringent environmental regulations focusing on reducing industrial emissions and enhancing air quality are propelling the Electrostatic Precipitator System Market. Key sectors like power generation, steel, and cement are increasingly adopting advanced pollution control technologies to adhere to these regulations. The market is witnessing significant growth as these industries invest in eco-friendly solutions. The global Electrostatic Precipitator System Market is projected to reach a market value of $7.5 billion by 2025, with a notable CAGR of 5.2% from 2020 to 2025. This growth is primarily driven by the increasing demand for efficient air pollution control systems across various industrial applications.

news.headline: Inventor from Ohio creates FLEX 300 wrist support for bowlers to reduce strain, provide consistent release.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 9, 2024, an inventor from Cleveland Heights, Ohio, shared his inspiration behind creating the FLEX 300 support brace for bowlers. He mentioned the need for a brace to ensure a consistent release and alleviate wrist strain. The lightweight and efficient design of the FLEX 300 aims to cater to these specific requirements.

news.headline: Medical second opinion market to reach $15.40B by 2031, with North America projected to hit $4.48B by 2027, growing at 17.1% CAGR.
news.summary: The medical second opinion market in North America is projected to expand significantly, with a predicted value of US$ 4,476.22 million by 2027, up from US$ 1,480.14 million in 2020. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 17.1% from 2020 to 2027. The increase in market size is primarily driven by the increasing focus on achieving better treatment results and...

news.headline: Veeva Systems to present at Raymond James 2024 TMT and Consumer Conference in NY on Dec. 11, 2024. CFO and EVP to speak.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, a technology company based in Pleasanton, California, Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV), revealed its involvement in an upcoming investor conference. This event, named the Raymond James 2024 TMT and Consumer Conference, is set to take place in New York, NY. The company's CFO, Brian Van Wagener, and EVP of Strategy, Paul Shawah, are scheduled to present on Wednesday. This presents a significant opportunity for the company to engage with investors and stakeholders, showcasing their latest developments and strategies. Such events play a crucial role in shaping market perspectives and driving financial decisions.

news.headline: Nulogy wins 2024 Top Software & Tech Award for empowering FMCG supply chains with materials visibility.
news.summary: A reputable supply chain software company, Nulogy, based in Toronto, has recently received the prestigious 2024 Top Software & Tech award for its outstanding contribution in enhancing visibility of materials in FMCG external supply chains. This recognition highlights the company's dedication to empowering supply chains in the Fast-Moving Consumer Goods sector. Nulogy is known for its innovative manufacturing supply chain solutions, which have significantly impacted the industry. This recognition reflects the company's commitment to excellence and signifies its importance in the tech sector.

news.headline: Full Glass Wine Co. acquires Wine Access and Cameron Hughes, marking its 6th and 7th acquisitions, aiming for $200M revenue by 2025.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Full Glass Wine Co., a leading parent company in the direct-to-consumer (DTC) wine industry, has expanded its portfolio by acquiring Wine Access and Cameron Hughes Wine. These acquisitions represent the 6th and 7th additions to the company in a span of 17 months. With these new additions, Full Glass Wine Co. solidifies its position as a key player in the DTC wine market, aiming to reach an estimated revenue of over $200 million by 2025. The company has demonstrated significant growth and influence in the industry, becoming a major force to be reckoned with.

news.headline: 2025 Calendar released by AB Akola Group for investors.
Kevin P. Chavous of Stride Inc. awarded 2024 Profiles in Diversity Journal Black Leadership Award for education reform and empowering students.
news.summary: Chavous was recognized for his dedication to improving education through reform initiatives, as well as his efforts to empower students.

news.headline: Antitrust probe opened by China against Nvidia.
Peter Schiff believes Bitcoin is a threat to the US, overshadowing gold, criticizes government using public funds to buy it.
news.summary: Prominent Bitcoin critic Peter Schiff has recently stated that Bitcoin poses a more significant risk to the U.S. than to gold. In a social media post on Sunday, Schiff expressed concern over the potential use of taxpayer money to invest in Bitcoin. While he recognizes private investments as individual decisions, Schiff believes that government acquisitions of Bitcoin could lead to a misallocation of resources, negatively impacting productive industries. He views Bitcoin as a greater threat to the U.S. economy rather than a competitor to gold. Schiff emphasized the issue of government using public funds to purchase Bitcoin, highlighting the risks associated with such actions. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Childcare workers in Nova Scotia demand new government prioritize childcare infrastructure post-election. #Halifax #CUPE4745
news.summary: After the provincial election in Nova Scotia, childcare workers are urging the newly elected government to enhance childcare infrastructure. Margot Nickerson, President of CUPE 4745 in Halifax, emphasized the importance for representatives to demonstrate the value they place on childcare. The workers seek significant investments in the sector to address the needs effectively.

news.headline: Lucky winner in Plantation, Fla. hits record $2,856,079 jackpot on Dragon Link slot machine at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino Hollywood.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking win on the Dragon Link slot machine by Aristocrat Gaming, a fortunate player from Plantation, Fla. struck gold with a record-breaking progressive jackpot of $2,856,079. The astounding win took place with a mere $250 bet, setting a new pinnacle for jackpot prizes in the gaming realm. This significant victory marks a turning point in the world of casino gaming, showcasing the immense possibilities brought forth by cutting-edge technology and rewarding the player with an awe-inspiring windfall.

news.headline: USDT's usage skyrockets: 330M wallets by Q3 2024 illustrate its dominance in digital assets, particularly in emerging markets.
news.summary: The significant growth of USDT is illustrated by the presence of 330 million on-chain wallets as of the third quarter of 2024. This underscores its importance as a major player in the digital asset sector, particularly in developing economies.

news.headline: CyberPower named to 2024 CRN Edge Computing 100 list in Shakopee, Minn. - recognized for excellence.
news.summary: A company based in Shakopee, Minnesota, CyberPower, has recently been recognized in the industry as it has secured a spot on the prestigious 2024 CRN Edge Computing 100 list. This list acknowledges the top players in the edge computing sector.

news.headline: Virtu Financial (NASDAQ: VIRT) hailed at The TRADE Leaders in Trading Awards for excellence, innovation in trading.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Virtu Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: VIRT), a prominent financial services provider utilizing advanced technology for innovative trading solutions and market liquidity, was honored in various categories at The TRADE Leaders in Trading Awards. This recognition highlights Virtu's dedication to pioneering trading technology and excellence in the industry.

news.headline: 40% consumers find ads irrelevant; AI personalization boosts engagement. Retailers see 10-25% increase in ROAS with AI campaigns.
news.summary: A study by Bain & Company has revealed that retailers implementing AI-powered targeted campaigns have observed a significant boost in return on ad spend, ranging from 10% to 25%. The findings, released in New York on December 9, 2024, emphasize the current consumer landscape inundated with advertisements on various platforms. Despite this saturation, a considerable portion of consumers believe these ads fail to resonate with them effectively.

New Political Trade Reported: WST - Sell - undisclosed - $1,000 - $15,000 -  - Jared Moskowitz

New Political Trade Reported: TSCO - Buy - child - $1,000 - $15,000 -  - Jared Moskowitz

New Political Trade Reported: TMUS - Buy - child - $1,000 - $15,000 -  - Jared Moskowitz

Meauxmentum Strategies and Investments (MSI) surpasses 100 locations, ranked 124th on Top Franchisee list.
news.summary: Located in Colleyville, Texas, Meauxmentum Strategies and Investments (MSI) made significant progress since its establishment in 2011 with 13 Taco Bell locations. In December 2024, MSI achieved a major milestone by opening its 100th franchise location. The company has steadily grown over the years and is now ranked 124th on the prestigious Top Franchisee list in Franchise Times. This growth signifies the successful expansion and development of MSI, showcasing its dedication to strategic investments and business ventures in the franchise industry.

news.headline: Inspection robots market projected to reach $5,593.6 million by 2031 - Meticulous Research report.
news.summary: In Redding, California, on December 9, 2024, a recent market research report was released detailing the Inspection Robots Market. This report covers various types of inspection robots including stationary and mobile ones, and their applications such as visual inspections, ultrasonic testing, photogrammetry, laser scanning, thermal imaging, and quality inspections. The market is segmented by end users, including various industries and inspection services. This report provides valuable insights into the growing market for inspection robots, reflecting the increasing demand for advanced technological solutions in industries.

news.headline: President Biden to host dinner for Special Olympics athletes competing in World Winter Games in Turin in March 2025.
news.summary: In preparation for the Special Olympics World Winter Games scheduled to take place in Turin in March 2025, President Joe Biden will be hosting a dinner to honor the Special Olympics athletes. The event is set to take place in Washington on December 9, 2024. This dinner serves as a gesture of recognition and support for the athletes as they gear up for the competition. It signifies a significant moment for the athletes and marks the beginning of their journey towards the world games.

news.headline: Virgo PR grows crypto PR division in response to increased market demand, reflecting renewed interest in the sector.
news.summary: A New York-based communications firm known for its success in Web3 applications is expanding its team and services to support the crypto industry. The company has seen a resurgence of interest in the sector and is responding by hiring new staff and offering additional services. This development comes amidst a wave of renewed attention towards cryptocurrencies. The firm, Virgo Public Relations, has a long history of success and is bolstering its capabilities to meet the growing demands of the industry.

news.headline: Societe Generale expects the S&P 500 index to reach 6750 by year-end 2025.
China launches antitrust investigation into Nvidia.
Inventor from Stockbridge, GA creates SMART CLIPPERS for hairstyling, providing more effective design.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 9, 2024, an inventor from Stockbridge, Georgia introduced a new line of hairstyling clippers called SMART CLIPPERS. The inventor, who is also an Image Consultant, felt there was a need for a more effective option in the market. These clippers feature an innovative design that offers a better way to activate them. The precise number of the improved features was not mentioned in the news.

news.headline: Meijer triples home delivery range, now serves additional 4M households in 60-minute radius from stores.
news.summary: Meijer, a Midwest retail chain based in Grand Rapids, Michigan, revealed on December 9, 2024, that it is extending its home delivery service area. The expansion will increase the delivery range from around 20 minutes to 60 minutes from its stores. This move triples the previous reach of the service, allowing a larger population to now access the convenient delivery option offered by Meijer.
